zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Preston II於1443年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Sir William Preston of Craigmillar26歲，母親Joan Marchante22歲。他和Janet Boithuill至少有4個兒子。他去世於1474年在他的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Preston II于1443年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲Sir William Preston of Craigmillar26岁，母亲Joan Marchante22岁。他和Janet Boithuill至少有4个儿子。他去世于1474年在他的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Preston II was born in 1443, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, Sir William Preston of Craigmillar, was 26 and his mother, Joan Marchante, was 22. He had at least 4 sons with Janet Boithuill. He died in 1474, in his hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Preston II est né en 1443, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Sir William Preston of Craigmillar, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Marchante, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Janet Boithuill. Il est décédé en 1474, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Preston II 1443 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Preston of Craigmillar 26 und seine Mutter Joan Marchante 22. Er hatte mit Janet Boithuill mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1474 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Preston II è nato il nel 1443 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Preston of Craigmillar, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan Marchante, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Janet Boithuill. Morì nel 1474, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Preston IIが1443年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Sir William Preston of Craigmillarは26歳，母Joan Marchanteは22歳であった。彼はJanet Boithuillとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1474年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Preston II(이)가 1443년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Preston of Craigmillar(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Marchante(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Janet Boithuill(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1474년 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Preston II nasceu em 1443, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Preston of Craigmillar, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Marchante, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Janet Boithuill. Ele faleceu em 1474, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Preston II родился в 1443 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Preston of Craigmillar было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Marchante, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Janet Boithuill. Он умер в 1474 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Preston II nació en 1443, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Preston of Craigmillar, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Marchante, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Janet Boithuill. Murió en 1474, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.
